key.name: deepwork-enabled
key.description: Hides notifications, panels, docks, and displays an ambient focus filter.

key.name: deepwork-snooze-level
key.description: 0 = Suppress Dock and Notifications; 1 = Suppress Panel, Dock, Notifications, and optional ambient effects; 2 = True ambient dimming behind the focused window.

key.name: deepwork-hide-dock
key.description: Automatically hide the desktop dock (Dash to Dock or Dash to Panel) during Deep Work.

key.name: deepwork-hide-panel
key.description: Automatically hide the shell's top panel during Deep Work (Level 2).

key.name: deepwork-hide-panel-in-overview
key.description: Controls whether the top panel is hidden while the Activities overview is open.

key.name: deepwork-mute-notifications
key.description: Automatically silence notification banners during Deep Work.

key.name: deepwork-ambient-dim
key.description: Applies a dimming filter to background windows or workspaces.

key.name: deepwork-ambient-color
key.description: Hex or RGBA color applied to background windows.

key.name: deepwork-ambient-dim-opacity
key.description: Opacity level of the dimming overlay (0.0 to 1.0).

key.name: deepwork-ambient-blur-intensity
key.description: Applies dynamic blur filter to background windows (0.0 to 1.0).

key.name: deepwork-true-ambient-opacity
key.description: Opacity of the true ambient overlay used in the strongest focus mode (minimum 0.1).

key.name: deepwork-ambient-dim-level3
key.summary: Keep background window dim active on Level 3
key.description: Applies background window dimming under the True Ambient scrim in Level 3 focus mode.

key.name: deepwork-ambient-blur-level3
key.summary: Keep background window blur active on Level 3
key.description: Applies background window blur under the True Ambient scrim in Level 3 focus mode.

key.name: deepwork-pomodoro-timer-enabled
key.description: Tracks Pomodoro focus and rest blocks with visual indicators.

key.name: deepwork-pomodoro-focus-time
key.description: Length of the deep work block (10 to 300 minutes).

key.name: deepwork-pomodoro-focus-infinite
key.description: When enabled, the focus session runs indefinitely as a count-up timer until explicitly stopped.

key.name: deepwork-pomodoro-rest-time
key.description: Length of the recovery block (5 to 180 minutes).

key.name: deepwork-pomodoro-clock-enabled
key.description: When enabled, disables Deep Work and resets the Pomodoro timer when the system clock reaches the configured time.

key.name: deepwork-pomodoro-clock-hour
key.description: Hour of day for the Pomodoro auto stop clock.

key.name: deepwork-pomodoro-clock-minute
key.description: Minute of hour for the Pomodoro auto stop clock.

key.name: deepwork-focus-notification-summary-enabled
key.description: Shows a delayed summary notification after focus if notification banners were silenced and notifications arrived.

key.name: deepwork-pomodoro-show-notification-count
key.description: Shows the number of silenced focus notifications beside the Pomodoro timer.

key.name: deepwork-pomodoro-panel-peek-duration
key.description: Seconds to temporarily show the hidden top panel from the floating timer.

key.name: deepwork-pomodoro-floating-x-ratio
key.description: Saved horizontal position of the floating Pomodoro timer as a monitor-relative ratio.

key.name: deepwork-pomodoro-floating-y-ratio
key.description: Saved vertical position of the floating Pomodoro timer as a monitor-relative ratio.

key.name: deepwork-pomodoro-floating-monitor
key.description: Last monitor used for the floating Pomodoro timer position.

key.name: deepwork-pomodoro-floating-vertical
key.description: When true, lays out the floating Pomodoro panel vertically instead of horizontally.

key.name: deepwork-pomodoro-floating-show-time
key.description: When true, shows the countdown timer on the floating Pomodoro widget.

key.name: deepwork-pomodoro-floating-show-clock
key.description: When true, shows the current system clock time on the floating Pomodoro widget.

key.name: deepwork-pomodoro-floating-collapsed
key.description: When true, collapses the floating Pomodoro panel to only show the timer/status icon and expand button.

key.name: deepwork-pomodoro-floating-icon-only
key.description: When true, collapses the floating Pomodoro panel further to only show a shrunken alarm clock status icon.

key.name: tweaks-battery-health-sound-enabled
key.description: Play a sound and optionally notify when battery charge crosses configured health thresholds.

key.name: tweaks-battery-health-sound-upper-threshold
key.description: Charge percentage that triggers the unplug reminder while charging.

key.name: tweaks-battery-health-sound-lower-threshold
key.description: Charge percentage that triggers the plug-in reminder while discharging.

key.name: tweaks-battery-health-sound-full-charge-enabled
key.description: Alert when the battery reaches full charge while charging.

key.name: tweaks-battery-health-sound-critical-charge-enabled
key.description: Alert when the battery drops to a critical charge level while discharging.

key.name: tweaks-battery-health-sound-play-sound
key.description: Play a desktop event sound when a battery health threshold is reached.

key.name: tweaks-battery-health-sound-respect-dnd
key.description: Do not play battery health sounds while Do Not Disturb is active.

key.name: tweaks-battery-health-sound-show-notification
key.description: Show a desktop notification when a battery health threshold is reached.

key.name: tweaks-essential-menu-enabled
key.description: Enable a centered floating application launcher menu.

key.name: tweaks-essential-menu-show-panel-icon
key.description: Show an application launcher icon in the top panel.

key.name: tweaks-essential-menu-panel-icon-placement
key.description: Where to place the Essential Menu panel icon relative to the workspace switcher. Supported values are before-workspaces and after-workspaces.

key.name: tweaks-essential-menu-shortcut-enabled
key.description: Open the centered application launcher with the configured keyboard shortcut.

key.name: tweaks-essential-menu-shortcut
key.description: Keyboard shortcut used to open the centered application launcher.

key.name: tweaks-essential-menu-trigger
key.description: Internal trigger used to request opening the floating application launcher.

key.name: tweaks-essential-menu-default-search-engine
key.description: Default search engine for web search prefix (duckduckgo, google, or bing).

key.name: tweaks-essential-menu-animations-enabled
key.description: Toggle hardware-accelerated animations in the centered menu launcher.

key.name: tweaks-essential-menu-backdrop-dim-enabled
key.description: Toggle the dim screen backdrop effect when the centered menu launcher pops open.

key.name: tweaks-essential-shelf-enabled
key.description: Enable a temporary shelf for explicitly saved files, folders, links, and text snippets.

key.name: tweaks-essential-shelf-show-in-menu
key.description: Show Essential Shelf actions and items inside the Essential Menu quick launcher.

key.name: tweaks-essential-shelf-show-notifications
key.description: Show desktop notifications for Essential Shelf actions.

key.name: tweaks-essential-shelf-persist
key.description: Keep shelf items after restarting GNOME Shell or logging out.

key.name: tweaks-essential-shelf-max-items
key.description: Maximum number of items kept in Essential Shelf.

key.name: tweaks-essential-shelf-trigger-clear
key.description: Internal trigger used by preferences to request clearing the Essential Shelf.

key.name: tweaks-essential-uninstall-enabled
key.description: Add an 'Uninstall' option to the right-click context menu of applications in the app grid.

key.name: tweaks-essential-uninstall-in-menu
key.summary: Show Uninstall Option in Essential Menu
key.description: Add an 'Uninstall' button to application search results inside the Essential Menu quick launcher.

key.name: tweaks-cli-creator-terminal
key.description: Terminal emulator used to launch non-background CLI applications. Leave blank for default shell terminal runner.

key.name: profiles-enabled
key.description: Allows saving and restoring active window coordinates and workspaces.

key.name: profiles-auto-launch
key.description: Automatically triggers flatpak or native binaries if applications are not currently running.

key.name: profiles-saved-data
key.description: JSON serialized string holding layout configurations.

key.name: profiles-active-profile
key.description: The name of the currently selected active profile layout.

key.name: profiles-trigger-save
key.description: Used for IPC between prefs.js and main process to trigger a layout save.

key.name: profiles-last-operation
key.description: JSON status payload used to send save, apply, rename, and delete feedback to preferences.

key.name: profiles-show-notifications
key.description: Show standard desktop notifications when switching workspace profiles.
